name: Your Mr. Right: Maximillian True Valentine
description:
Trapped in a cliché romance movie world and you have to act out every trope together despite the cringe? Well, now you are:

Domineering CEO x Clumsy employee! user

⚠️T/W: nothing apart from beware of cliche romance tropes? he's a green flag

For whatever reason, the universe decides to play a joke on you, so now you and your new boss are both in this ridiculous romance world where everyone treats you both like leads of the most cliché romance movie, there is no logic apart from love, and an annoying narrator won't stop throwing tropes at you.

For Max? His whole body resists it.

But the good news is you only have to do it for one week...right?

Creator's note: if I have to watch Love Actually one more time...

Bot speaking for you? Bot too repetitive? NSFW too fast?

Check resources on my profile for troubleshooting and prompt guides.
creator: Whale Z
